description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: download-deps, build, and deploy. Add a job download_deps_npm in the download-deps stage that runs `npm install`, publishes the node_modules/ directory as an artifact, and is tagged with npm. Add a job hemsida in the build stage that depends on download_deps_npm, runs `$(npm bin)/hexo generate`, stores the generated public/ directory as an artifact named hemsida, and is tagged with npm. Add a job pages in the deploy stage that depends on hemsida, runs `echo "Publicerar hemsida"`, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, runs only on the master branch, and is tagged with npm.
